storefront.title: Cute homeware and gifts
storefront.description: Bring a little joy and ease into everyday life.

adminLogin.title: Admin sign in
adminLogin.description: For authorized store administrators only. Sign-in status is verified securely on the server.

header.announcement: Pickup and local delivery around Vancouver · Final arrangements are confirmed by the shop owner

footer.tagline: Bring a little joy and ease into everyday life.
footer.currency: All prices are shown in CAD.
footer.confirmation: Stock, delivery, and final arrangements are confirmed by the shop owner.
footer.storefrontAlt: The Happy Beans storefront inside Aberdeen Centre in Richmond
footer.connectBody: Scan a code to follow new arrivals or get in touch with us.
footer.instagramQrAlt: QR code for Happy Beans on Instagram at happy_beans2023

home.title: Bring a little joy and ease into everyday life.
home.intro: From cups and tableware to gentle home accents, find a small treat for yourself or someone special.
home.animalCupsAlt: Cat and Shiba Inu tea cups
home.categoriesIntro: Browse by everyday moments and find just the right little thing.
home.newIntro: Meet the newest little finds at Happy Beans.
home.featuredIntro: Lovely for daily life and thoughtful enough to wrap as a gift.
home.saleIntro: Original and current CAD prices are always shown clearly.
home.storyBody: We bring together everyday objects that make life feel a little brighter. Real product photos and clear details about options, prices, and stock keep every cute find practical too.
home.storyLocale: This storefront is available in English and Chinese. All prices are in CAD.
home.fulfillmentIntro: Our first release focuses on pickup and limited local delivery around Vancouver.
home.pickupBody: The shop owner will confirm the pickup location and available time. No address is required while browsing.
home.deliveryBody: Delivery area, fees, taxes, and the final total will be confirmed after stock is checked.
home.faqIntro: A few helpful details before you shop.
home.faqCurrencyQ: What currency are the prices in?
home.faqCurrencyA: All public prices are in Canadian dollars (CAD). We do not show other currencies or convert exchange rates.
home.faqStockQ: Do all colours and sizes have the same stock?
home.faqStockA: Not always. Every option combination has its own price and stock. Choose all options on the product page to see availability.
home.faqPaymentA: Online payment is not available in this release. Submit an order request and the shop owner will contact you to confirm stock, taxes, and the final total.
home.contactTitle: Looking for a cute little find?
home.contactBody: Browse all products or use search to find something quickly.
home.categoryEmptyBody: You can browse all products in the meantime.
home.fulfillmentEmptyBody: Please wait for the shop owner to confirm the latest arrangements before completing an order request.
home.deliveryPosterAlt: Happy Beans delivery service: free delivery over $35 in Richmond; free delivery over $55 within 15 kilometres of Richmond Centre; contact customer service for locations beyond 15 kilometres.
home.deliveryPosterCaption: Richmond delivery details · Please contact us to confirm your address.

catalog.emptyBody: Try another keyword or clear the filters.
catalog.allDescription: Filter by category, availability, sale, or price to find something just right.
catalog.allSeoDescription: Search and filter all public Happy Beans products.

collections.newDescription: Browse the newest finds at Happy Beans.
collections.featuredDescription: Shop owner picks for everyday use or thoughtful gifting.
collections.saleDescription: Products currently on sale, with original and current prices shown clearly.

product.chooseForStock: Choose all options to check stock
product.selectionNotice: Choose all options to see the current price and stock.
product.selectionError: This option combination is unavailable. Please choose another.
product.cartLimit: Your cart has reached the current stock limit
product.cartNoteBody: Your cart is saved in this browser. Product prices, stock, and status are checked again on the cart page.
product.pickupBody: Location and time to be confirmed
product.deliveryBody: Area and fee to be confirmed
product.detailsFallback: The shop owner will add more material, sizing, and care details soon.

cart.title: Cart
cart.intro: Different option combinations are saved separately and stay here after a refresh.
cart.loading: Checking current product prices and stock on the server…
cart.validationError: We could not check your cart right now. Locally saved prices were not used. Please try again.
cart.recovered: Unreadable cart data was found and removed safely.
cart.emptyBody: Choose all product options, then add your favourites here.
cart.unavailableBody: This product may be unpublished or this option may be disabled. Remove it and choose again.
cart.clearConfirm: Remove every item from your cart?
cart.priceChanged: The price changed. The amount below is the current server-verified price.
cart.stockChanged: Stock changed. You can currently request up to {stock}.
cart.soldOut: This option is sold out. Remove it or try again later.
cart.blockingIssue: Some cart items need attention. Follow the message on each item before continuing.
cart.validationNote: All prices, stock, and product status shown here were verified by the server.
cart.feesTitle: Delivery fees and taxes to be confirmed
cart.feesBody: Only the merchandise subtotal is shown. Delivery fees, taxes, and the final total will be confirmed by the shop owner.
cart.orderRequestLater: This is an order request, not an online payment or final order confirmation.

orderRequest.pageDescription: Send Happy Beans an unpaid order request for shop-owner confirmation.
orderRequest.pageIntro: Share only the contact and fulfillment details we need. We do not collect a full street address or request online payment here.
orderRequest.loadingCart: Reading the cart saved on this device…
orderRequest.emptyTitle: There are no items to submit
orderRequest.emptyBody: Choose all product options and add an item to your cart before completing an order request.
orderRequest.name: Name
orderRequest.summaryIntro: Products, prices, and stock were checked on the server. The submission transaction will verify them independently once more.
orderRequest.summaryLoading: Checking current products, prices, and stock…
orderRequest.summaryError: We cannot check your order summary right now. Return to your cart and try again.
orderRequest.stockError: There is not enough stock. Return to your cart and adjust the quantity.
orderRequest.unavailableError: This product or option is unavailable. Return to your cart and remove it.
orderRequest.emailOptionNote: Contact me at the email above
orderRequest.phoneOptionNote: A phone number will be required
orderRequest.pickupNote: The shop owner will confirm the location and time
orderRequest.deliveryNote: The shop owner will confirm the area and fee
orderRequest.preferredTimePlaceholder: For example: Saturday afternoon (final time to be confirmed)
orderRequest.confirmNotice: Submitting does not take payment or create a final confirmed order. Happy Beans will contact you to confirm stock, pickup or delivery, taxes, and the final total.
orderRequest.consent: I understand this is an order request and agree to provide the necessary information above only for contact and fulfillment arrangements.
orderRequest.genericError: We could not submit your order request. Please try again later. Your cart remains saved on this device.
orderRequest.stockServerError: Some items do not have enough stock. Return to your cart and check again.
orderRequest.unavailableServerError: Some products are unavailable or disabled. Return to your cart and check again.
orderRequest.translationServerError: Some products are missing content in this language. Return to your cart and check again.
orderRequest.rateLimited: There have been several submissions. Please try again in one hour or contact Happy Beans for help.
orderRequest.nameError: Enter a name between 1 and 120 characters.
orderRequest.phoneRequiredError: Enter a phone number when phone contact is selected.
orderRequest.phoneLengthError: The phone number cannot exceed 40 characters.
orderRequest.cityError: Enter a city or area between 1 and 120 characters.
orderRequest.postalRequiredError: Enter a postal code for local delivery.
orderRequest.postalLengthError: The postal code cannot exceed 20 characters.
orderRequest.otherContactError: The additional contact method cannot exceed 120 characters.
orderRequest.timeError: The preferred time cannot exceed 200 characters.
orderRequest.consentError: Agree to the order request and privacy notice before submitting.
orderRequest.cartError: The cart is empty or invalid. Return to your cart and check again.
orderRequest.successKicker: Your order request was saved securely
orderRequest.successHeading: Thank you — we received your request
orderRequest.successNotice: This request is unpaid and is not a final order confirmation.
orderRequest.successBody: Happy Beans will contact you using your preferred method to confirm stock, pickup or delivery, taxes, and the final total. Keep the request number above.

errors.loadBody: Your product information is safe. Please try again.
errors.notFoundBody: The product may be unavailable or the link may have changed.
